name: ara-promo
description: Remotion promo video for ara — AI research arm (ara.guzus.xyz)

scripts.render: npm run assets && remotion render Promo out/ara-promo.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18
scripts.render:vertical: npm run assets && remotion render PromoVertical out/ara-promo-vertical.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18
scripts.render:square: npm run assets && remotion render PromoSquare out/ara-promo-square.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18
scripts.poster: npm run assets && remotion still Promo out/poster.png --frame=470
scripts.gif: npm run assets && remotion render Promo out/ara-promo.gif --codec=gif --width=960 --every-nth-frame=2
